2604.13556.title: YOCO++: Enhancing YOCO with KV Residual Connections for Efficient LLM Inference
2604.13556.paper_summary: Cross-layer key-value (KV) compression has been found to be effective in efficient inference of large language models (LLMs). Although they reduce the memory consumption of the KV cache, such methods usually introduce non-negligible performance degradation. In this work, we aim to enhance the performance of YOCO, a cross-layer KV compression method that shares the KVs of the middle layer with the top-half layers. We propose YOCO++, an enhanced YOCO that incorporates a weighted residual connection between the KVs of each bottom-half layer and the bottom layer. Compared to YOCO, YOCO++ increases model capacity while maintaining the same training and inference efficiency. Our experiments show that YOCO++ achieves state-of-the-art performance among the cross-layer KV compression methods at a 50% KV cache compression rate, outperforming the standard Transformer.
2604.13556.paper_summary_zh: 跨層鍵值（KV）壓縮已被發現對於大型語言模型（LLMs）的高效推理是有效的。儘管它們減少了KV緩存的記憶體消耗，但這類方法通常會引入不可忽視的性能下降。在本研究中，我們旨在提升YOCO的性能，這是一種跨層KV壓縮方法，將中層的KVs與上半部層共享。我們提出了YOCO++，這是一種增強版的YOCO，融入了每個下半部層的KVs與底層之間的加權殘差連接。與YOCO相比，YOCO++在保持相同的訓練和推理效率的同時，增加了模型容量。我們的實驗顯示，YOCO++在50%的KV緩存壓縮率下，實現了跨層KV壓縮方法中的最先進性能，超越了標準Transformer。
2604.13556.author: You Wu et.al.
2604.13556.authors: You Wu, Ziheng Chen, Yizhen Zhang, Haoyi Wu, Chengting Yu, Yuchi Xu, Wenbo Su, Bo Zheng, Kewei Tu
